configurations.name: web
runtimeArgs: npm install --no-fund --no-audit && uv run python manage.py migrate --no-input  && uv run python manage.py seed_test_data --data users && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./src/css/main.css -o ./static/css/output.css && { npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./src/css/main.css -o ./static/css/output.css --watch & exec uv run python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:${PORT:-8100}; }
